candidates.why: Revenue-related label but appears to be only a component/subcategory, not the main top-line.
Revenue-related label but appears to be only a component/subcategory, not the main top-line.
Explicit total revenue line and populated; matches top-line sales/revenue best.
COGS line, not revenue.
COGS line, not revenue.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit top-line revenue total. Although 'Net sale s' has identical values, it is not in the candidate list and 'Total Revenue' is the cleaner reported revenue label.

candidates.why: Standard COGS label and populated across years.
Also a COGS label, but appears missing in 2025 and slightly differs from the primary populated line.
Explicit COGS label and values match 'Cost of sales'; also valid.

variables.notes: Chose the standard populated COGS line. 'Cost of revenues/COGS' is effectively a duplicate with identical values; no need to repeat.

candidates.why: Core SG&A component; populated and clearly overhead.
Same concept as selling expenses, but appears duplicate/older variant.
Core SG&A component; populated and clearly overhead.
Explicit SG&A row exists, but appears unpopulated in preview.
Excluded because XSGA should exclude depreciation.
Excluded because XSGA should exclude depreciation.

variables.notes: Per rule hierarchy, an explicit SG&A row exists but appears mostly empty, so included it plus closest overhead buckets for coverage. Excluded depreciation subcomponents and avoided totals/balancing rows.

candidates.why: Direct R&D expense line on the income statement; best match.
R&D-related depreciation only; should be excluded from XRD.
Balance sheet asset, not current-period R&D expense.
Balance sheet contra-asset, not R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Research and development project in progress
candidates.why: Balance sheet asset/work in progress, not P&L R&D expense.
Ambiguous balance sheet label, not clearly period expense.

variables.notes: Selected the explicit income statement R&D expense line.

candidates.why: Broad finance-cost line; acceptable fallback if no explicit interest expense is available for a year.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities
candidates.why: Explicit interest expense, but only lease-related and limited coverage.

candidates.row_label: Interest expenses and other financial expenses
candidates.why: Contains interest expense and is more specific than total financial expenses, though mixed with other finance costs.
Explicit pure interest expense label, but appears unpopulated in preview.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supplemental
candidates.why: Explicit interest but supplemental and lease-specific only.

final_choice.row_label: Interest expenses and other financial expenses

variables.notes: Provided a priority list per instruction: prefer explicit interest expense, then mixed interest/other financial expenses, then broad financial expenses as fallback. Excluded lease-specific supplemental/detail rows from the main priority because they are narrower than total interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the Parent Company
candidates.why: Preferred owner/parent equity line that excludes non-controlling interests.
Usable only if no parent/owner equity exists; here it would risk including NCI.
Balancing/subtotal row; should not be used.

final_choice.row_label: Equity attributable to owners of the Parent Company

variables.notes: Selected parent/owner equity to avoid double counting with MIB.

candidates.why: Income statement allocation line, not the preferred balance sheet NCI for equity denominator.
Income statement allocation line, not the preferred balance sheet NCI for equity denominator.
Balance sheet NCI line, but appears blank while a populated capitalization variant exists.
Balance sheet NCI line, populated with zeros and best match.
Also valid but a total/duplicate of the NCI line; less preferred than the direct label.

variables.notes: Used balance-sheet NCI labels as a priority list to handle label variation. Preferred 'Non-controlling Interests' because it is populated; included lowercase variant second for coverage.
